name: Oblivion Connection
outcome: [AttackerName] slowly pops the lollipop out from her soft lips with just her long tongue, then pulls it all into her mouth, making you cry out as a pulse of dark magic resonates through the candy and across your shared sensations, before moaning incoherently as you feel her tongue ravenously massage your entire length, keenly experiencing every lick and suck!
miss: With a smug smile [AttackerName] slowly pops the lollipop out from her soft lips with just her long tongue, waving it at you for a moment before pulling the entire thing into her mouth, and you cry out as you feel a dangerous pulse of dark magic resonate with the candy and your shared sensations with it, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure the teasing sensation!
